description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, ribbed neckline with an in-seam, half sleeves and graphic print with a jean effect on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments For over 100 years now lee has been making absolutely comfortable, durable and stylish jeans for the world over. Having taken absolute responsibility to create the best jean wear, lee prides in its achievement. So if you are a true Lee fan, grab this tee and flaunt it in style to pay tribute to the fabulous company. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
